hook.text: ROMANO SAYS FERNANDES DEAL IS ON

beats.text: UNITED NOW IN DIRECT CONTACT WITH FERNANDES' CAMP
THE PLAYER IS VERY KEEN ON THE MOVE
BUT UNITED WON'T MATCH WEST HAM'S £85M VALUE

caption: Significant shift in the Fernandes saga 🔴 After yesterday's price deadlock, Fabrizio Romano now confirms the deal is ON — Manchester United are in direct contact with West Ham midfielder Mateus Fernandes' camp, and the player is very keen on making the move. The sticking point: West Ham's £85m valuation. INEOS won't go that high, but the momentum has shifted. Think they get this one over the line? 👇 REPORTED — per Fabrizio Romano. #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #transfernews #transferwindow
